title: Church Cookout and Evening Gathering
description: Join us Sunday evening as we get together as a church family to celebrate the 250th anniversary of our nation. We will enjoy a simple evening with a short sermon, a fire and time for fellowship. We will have a fire ready for roasting marshmallows and making s'mores. Feel free to bring a hotdog or something small to cook over the fire if you like, most of all bring yourself! Drinks will be provided by the church.
location: Victory Baptist Church - 295 Pleasant View Drive, Kittanning, PA 16201
